channel.title: BBC Weather - Forecast for Cardiff, GB

image.title: BBC Weather - Forecast for Cardiff, GB

item.title: Tonight: Partly Cloudy, Minimum Temperature: 3°C (37°F)
item.description: Minimum Temperature: 3°C (37°F), Wind Direction: north-westerly, Wind Speed: 11mph, Visibility: Good, Pressure: 1022mb, Humidity: 85%, UV Risk: 2, Pollution: Low, Sunset: 19:45 BST

item.title: Thursday: Sunny Intervals, Minimum Temperature: 7°C (44°F) Maximum Temperature: 12°C (54°F)
item.description: Maximum Temperature: 12°C (54°F), Minimum Temperature: 7°C (44°F), Wind Direction: northerly, Wind Speed: 11mph, Visibility: Very Good, Pressure: 1022mb, Humidity: 66%, UV Risk: 4, Pollution: Low, Sunrise: 06:47 BST, Sunset: 19:47 BST

item.title: Friday: Light Rain, Minimum Temperature: 7°C (45°F) Maximum Temperature: 13°C (56°F)
item.description: Maximum Temperature: 13°C (56°F), Minimum Temperature: 7°C (45°F), Wind Direction: south-westerly, Wind Speed: 20mph, Visibility: Moderate, Pressure: 1012mb, Humidity: 87%, UV Risk: 1, Pollution: Low, Sunrise: 06:45 BST, Sunset: 19:49 BST
